message:
feat(btree,mvcc): extend cursor navigation and fix cache_aligned alignment

- cursor.rs: add ~47 lines of cursor seek/navigation methods for
  efficient btree traversal including seek-to-rowid and boundary checks
- cache_aligned.rs: fix alignment attribute for cache-line padding
- beads: sync issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
